parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter representing mortality effect per enrollee

programs.comments: This program uses the accounting identity deltaN = deltaB / c to express beta from deltaB, then applies a dilution mapping beta = (deltaN/N_pop) * kappa to relate incremental enrollment to mortality effect.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter representing mortality effect per enrollee

programs.comments: This program explicitly converts incremental federal outlays to enrollment using deltaN = deltaB / c, then applies the mortality effect proportionally to the analysis population.
